ddt:Target.Name: ECU HITACHI X91 6x40
ddt:Target.Description:
ESSENCE - WB56 / EWR21 Véhicules : X91 Motorisations : M4R / V4Y Logiciels : 6640 / 6440 Status : En cours de test Co-auteurs : Rémy COUTURIER Tel. : 78869 remy.couturier-renexter@renault.com Nicolas DABADIE Tel : 78939 nicolas.dabadie-renexter@renault.com Xavier SEGAIN Tel : 77413 xavier.segain@renault.com
Modifications par C.CANDAS 06 janvier 2006 - Nettoyage sur les organes :suppression d'un flag de panne, de requete de freeze associe aux organes (Spec A uniquement) - Ajout de 2 organes d'information regroupant les donnees des trames 2121 et 2122 (pour avoir ces données dans un fichiers failures) - Definir les requetes service 22 en dossier de maintenabilité - Suppression des requetes du service 22 en doublon - Suppression des données non utilisées
Il manque l'association des données du service 22 a leur organe respectif (pour avoir un fichier failures complet)

Item.Text: Assembly line testing and after sales session

Data.Name: diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
diag. byte upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
fan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine management
fan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine management
Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: Output Temporary Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type OBD codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Air flow meter low input diagnosis
Air flow meter high input diagnosis
Atmospheric pressure sensor low input diagnosis
Atmospheric pressure sensor high input diagnosis
Intake air temperature sensor low input diagnosis
Intake air temperature sensor high input diagnosis
Coolant temperature sensor low input diagnosis
Coolant temperature sensor high input diagnosis
Rise in coolant temperature sensor unusual
Intake air temperature sensor function diagnosis
Front O2 sensor unusual voltage diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor unusual voltage diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor unusual voltage diagnosis (bank 2)
Fuel system lean side failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Fuel system lean side failure diagnosis (bank 2)
Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank 2)
Invalid Alternator power value transmitted by USM
Canister purge control solenoid valve open circuit diagnosis
Canister purge control solenoid valve short circuit diagnosis

Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch open circuit
One of brake switch failure OR Both of brake switch infered failure
Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch invalid value
Air flow meter intermediate voltage diagnosis
Throttle motor power source system short circuit failure
Throttle motor power source system open circuit failure
Throttle motor system short circuit failure

Front O2 sensor Rich shift diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor Lean output failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor Rich output failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor Lean output failure diagnosis (bank 2)
Rear O2 sensor Rich output failure diagnosis (bank 2)
Decrease in TPS full closed position learned value
Improper update of TPS full closed position learned value
Detected failure of alternator power information

Rear O2 sensor unusual voltage diagnosis (bank 1)

Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank 1)

Data.Name: The automatic gearbox is on reverse position
The automatic gearbox is on neutral position

The brake status information is absent

Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Device.Name: Air flow meter high input diagnosis
Air flow meter intermediate voltage diagnosis
Air flow meter low input diagnosis
Atmospheric pressure sensor high input diagnosis
Atmospheric pressure sensor low input diagnosis
Canister purge control solenoid valve open circuit diagnosis
Canister purge control solenoid valve short circuit diagnosis
CC/SL main switch failure OR Steering wheel command switch failure
Coolant temperature sensor high input diagnosis
Coolant temperature sensor low input diagnosis
Decrease in TPS full closed position learned value
Detected failure of alternator power information
Fuel system lean side failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Improper update of TPS full closed position learned value
Intake air temperature sensor high input diagnosis
Intake air temperature sensor low input diagnosis
Invalid or absent vehicle speed / Validation when PARAMx=02
One of brake switch failure OR Both of brake switch infered failure
Rear O2 sensor Lean output failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor Rich output failure diagnosis (bank 1)
Rear O2 sensor unusual voltage diagnosis (bank 1)
Throttle motor power source system open circuit failure
Throttle motor power source system short circuit failure
Throttle motor system short circuit failure
Power steering oil pressure sensor diagnosis
Fuel system rich side failure diagnosis (bank 2)
Fuel system lean side failure diagnosis (bank 2)
Intake air temperature sensor function diagnosis
Rear O2 sensor unusual voltage diagnosis (bank 2)
Rear O2 sensor Lean output failure diagnosis (bank 2)
Rear O2 sensor Rich output failure diagnosis (bank 2)
Rise in coolant temperature sensor unusual
Invalid Alternator power value transmitted by USM
Front O2 sensor Lean shift diagnosis (bank 1)
Front O2 sensor Rich shift diagnosis (bank 1)
Front O2 sensor unusual voltage diagnosis (bank 1)
Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch invalid value
Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch open circuit

DeviceData.Name: diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
diag. byte upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frame
fan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine management
fan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine management
Air conditioning pressure sensor open circuit detected failure
Air conditioning pressure sensor short circuit detected failure
Air conditionning pressure sensor open circuit memorized failure
Air conditionning pressure sensor short circuit memorized failure
Air conditionning pressure detection. Stored in E2PROM
Boolean indicating whether status is protected
Request of CC/SL inhibition on accel pedal failure (on mechanical device or electrical sensor)
The engine control disables the cruise control or the speed limiter
Input of the speed limiter main switch
Input of the cruise control main switch
State of the steering wheel buttons : not filtered (bit0)
State of the steering wheel buttons : not filtered (bit1)
State of the steering wheel buttons : not filtered (bit2)
State of the steering wheel buttons : not filtered (bit3)
Detect the speed distance limiter option. Stored in E2PROM
Detect speed limiter option with security on configuration detection. Stored in E2PROM

Detect the speed limiter switch connection. Stored in E2PROM
